name: Frozen Fruit Compote
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Granulated sugar (or less to taste, divided)
2 large Naval oranges, peeled and halved with the sections removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine strawberries, blueberries, and blackberries with 1/2 cup of sugar. Let stand at room temperature until the berries thaw, about 1 1/2 hours. Stir occasionally and taste; add more sugar if necessary.
2. In a large colander, strain the berries into a bowl placed under it to save the juice.
3. Place cornstarch in a medium saucepan and stir with the reserved juice. Turn on the heat to medium and cook, stirring until the juice thickens and becomes translucent, about 10 to 15 minutes. Let cool.
4. In an attractive serving bowl, place the berries and pour the sauce over them. Add the oranges and gently stir. Cover and chill before serving.
